song.title: He Is So Rich
song.author: A.B. Simpson
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G Give up the world, Christ to obtain. . D G He is your heart’s very need. . G7 C What else can you desire or seek? . G D7 G All things are empty indeed!
[C] .G C G He is so rich, He is so full. . D7 G He can fulfill all your needs! . G7 C He is so good, He is so sweet. . D7 G All your desire He exceeds!
[V2] Give up the world, Christ to obtain. He is the One you require. Once you receive this glorious Christ, Never the rest you’ll desire.
[V3] Though very great is all the world, And very small is your heart, Yet the great world with all it’s wealth Never can fill your small heart.
[V4] If you have Christ, you have all joys, Without this Christ, only pains. Where there is Christ, there morning is. Where He is not, night remains.
